summary: Daily family-friendly event pull for Omaha, Nebraska. Filters include faith-based, kid-friendly, and conservative-appropriate content for ages 0-12.

events.event_name: Bob Kerrey Pedestrian Bridge - Walk & Recreation
events.location: Bob Kerrey Pedestrian Bridge, Old Market to Council Bluffs, IA
events.description: 1,000-foot cable-stayed pedestrian bridge connecting Omaha to Council Bluffs with stunning views of the Missouri River. Perfect for family walks, biking, and scenic photos. Safe, accessible outdoor recreation.

events.event_name: Chirpy's Play Cafe - Indoor Play Center
events.location: Chirpy's Play Cafe, Multiple Omaha Locations
events.description: Soft play indoor facility with climbing structures, slides, ball pits, and sensory activities perfect for toddlers and preschoolers. Climate-controlled space ideal for rainy days and hot summers.

events.location: Kiewit Luminarium, 10805 Regency Parkway, Omaha, NE
events.description: Interactive STEM learning center featuring hands-on science and technology exhibits. Kids explore engineering, physics, light, and innovation through play.

events.event_name: Strawberry Festival at Nelson Produce Farm
events.location: Nelson Produce Farm, 10505 N 234 St, Valley, NE
events.description: Annual strawberry celebration packed with fun activities. Pick your own strawberries, enjoy farm-fresh treats, petting zoo, hayrides, and educational farm activities.

events.event_name: Rainforest Falls VBS at King of Kings Church
events.location: King of Kings Church, Northwest Omaha
events.description: Week-long Vacation Bible School with daily activities, crafts, songs, and lessons about faith and being rooted in God's love.
Family-friendly Black Arts & Cultural Festival honoring 161 years of freedom. Features local Black artists, entertainment, live music, food vendors, and kids activities.
